title: Asuka actually does see a Rei before dying
display_title: Asuka actually does see a Rei before dying
wikitext:
[]: Asuka actually does see a Rei before dying             Quote Post by Polker11 » Tue Sep 06, 2011 2:21 am This theory is a little rushed so forgive me if it's a little rushed All people one the day during 3I saw a Rei before dying (inconsistently only Misato and Ristsuko not any Nerv personnel or JSDF, probably wouldn't make sense if they did) and for a long time I always thought that Asuka never saw a Rei (or at least not that we see) In Asuka's last moments she raises her hand towards the flying MP evas and ultimately gets her arm cut in half and presumably dies immediately and if not undoubtedly died from 7 lances. My theory is that Asuka isn't saying I'll kill you to the MP evas but to Rei, before you dismiss this theory hear me out. 1).You never see though Asuka's eyes towards the MP evas only unit 02's which makes me think that Anno did it on purpose to suggest that this might be the case. 2). Asuka had absolutely no choice of reaching the MP evas unless somehow she had Bardiels elastic arms. I do know that at that point she would be more like, I'm gonna kill you no matter what but still a little can only go so far 3). That is exactly how Asuka would respond to seeing Rei floating above her kinda like saying "You bitch I'd like to see you do better" And just to bring back the terrible memories of the commentary of evil AWL- Rei is the little blue-haired harpinture of death Those are my thoughts please feel free to build,disprove or shut down my theory [/img]

[]:             Quote Post by John » Tue Sep 06, 2011 12:16 pm Absolutely possible in my opinion. Even if I'm not the wisest in here. Off topic: I never realized that quantum-traveler Rei seriously appears everytime someone dies. Wouldn't that mean that Shinji is supposed to die at the beginning of the series?... And why she appears when Eva-01/Yui finally goes to space in EoE? Also before Shinji tries to strangle Asuka!

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Sep 06, 2011 12:47 pm She only appeared to everyone like that for the purposes of collecting their souls for Instrumentality. Afterwards, those two visions, plus the train conversations Shinji has with her when she's not physically present, imply that after instrumentality, Rei's spirit transcended time in order to watch over Shinji (and perhaps all of mankind) like a guardian angel forever.

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Tue Sep 06, 2011 3:04 pm Well this topic is already in the wiki . Could be interesting to know if Kaji saw Rei too, but I don't think so. Bye

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Sep 06, 2011 4:43 pm Existing thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=8644

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Sun Sep 11, 2011 8:22 am (Since I am not commenting on whether or not Asuka saw a vision of Rei or not, but rather the significance of the shot described by the OP, I believe this post belongs more in this thread than in the one linked to. Please correct me if I'm wrong.) What I believe is more relevant about the Asuka POV shot raising her arm up towards the sky is the central position of the sun. Remember that the very first time we saw Asuka, Shinji was gazing up at her on the aircraft carrier, where her silhouette was brightly outlined against the bright sun. Asuka's final scene ending with her outstretched arm grasping towards a bright sun serves, in my opinion, as a bookend accompanying her introduction scene, just like the entire series is bookended by Shinji seeing ghostly visions of Rei. Rei also has a similar pair of bookends, although slightly more subtle. Right before Operation Yashima starts, Rei and Shinji have their first real heart-to-heart conversation, with Rei outlined sharply against the full moon. Giant Naked Rei's death scene in EoE also takes place against a backdrop of the full moon, including the final view we have of her cracked face crashlanded in the red, post-apocalyptic landscape beneath the full moon. So while I believe it is possible to interpret the blindingly bright light towards which Asuka stretches out her arm as her seeing a vision of Rei, I am not convinced one way or the other whether this is a correct interpretation of that scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Sephizim » Sun Sep 11, 2011 8:54 am ^^The above also ties in neatly to the Asuka/sun connections and Rei/moon connections. As far as the Asuka bookend part goes, that was not something I had noticed before. I was about to go add that to the wiki entry about Asuka and the sun, but it appears that the information is already there...

[]:             Quote Post by someguy » Sun Sep 11, 2011 8:00 pm Last line before dying: "I'll kill you" [URL=http://imageshack.us/photo/my-images/69/vlcsnap2011091117h43m36.jpg/] [/URL] Original last line before Fin: "No way I'll let you kill me!" COINCIDENCE?!

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Wed Sep 14, 2011 2:09 pm someguy wrote: COINCIDENCE?!

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Thu Sep 15, 2011 4:12 pm Viking wrote: Could be interesting to know if Kaji saw Rei too, but I don't think so.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Thu Sep 15, 2011 6:56 pm Cody MacArthur Fett wrote: If that was true then that would mean that Rei killed Kaji, and Kaji wasn't surprised by this, which would be weird.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Sep 16, 2011 2:08 pm As for the topic: I think it's possible, but not necessarily plausible. Remember, time traveling Quantum Rei almost always appeared as a loved one to the people she was assimilating, so that probably means that Asuka saw her Mama before exploding into tang.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Fri Sep 16, 2011 5:20 pm And if Asuka was saying that to her mother's image...is it possible for that family to be even more screwed up than we already think it is? I must ponder this...
